headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://connect.facebook.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://www.facebook.com https://www.google-analytics.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com https://region1.google-analytics.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
